semantic.role: Vitest integration test suite for ArchSpine's JSON schema validation and synchronization service orchestration.
responsibilities: Validates Spine unit and shared JSON schemas using Ajv with allErrors and formats enabled.
Tests the SyncService integration with a mock LLM client in isolated test environments.
Manages temporary test directories and files for schema validation and synchronization fixtures.
Ensures all index files in the .spine/index directory conform to the Spine unit schema.
outOfScope: Testing UI components or frontend rendering.
Direct database persistence or ORM layer testing.
Production API endpoint integration beyond the SyncService.
Performance or load testing of the ArchSpine system.
invariants: Must be a Vitest test file (.test.ts suffix).
Depends on the spine-unit.schema.json and shared.schema.json for validation.
Uses a mocked LLM client to isolate tests from external AI services.
Creates and cleans up temporary directories during test execution.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide isolated, deterministic integration tests for core ArchSpine schema validation and synchronization services, ensuring system consistency and contract adherence.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Harden risk hotspots with LLM/database decoupling and engine smoke tests (though not directly evidenced in the provided AST header).
